revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-050

A procedure of periodically checking or reconditioning a system to prevent or reduce the probability of failure or deterioration while in service. 

Preventive maintenance provides systematic inspection, detection and correction of incipient failures before they occur or develop into major malfunctions.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Preventive maintenance}}
